description.overview: Miniature Schnauzers are friendly, intelligent dogs with distinctive beards. They're the most popular of the three Schnauzer sizes and make excellent family companions.
description.temperament: Friendly and obedient but with terrier spirit. They're alert watchdogs with a tendency to bark. Good with children and other dogs.
description.health: Generally healthy but prone to pancreatitis, diabetes, and eye problems. Keep them on a healthy diet.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Daily walks and play sessions. Enjoy dog sports and training.

not_for: Those who prefer very calm dogs
verdict.summary: Friendly, smart, and hypoallergenic. Mini Schnauzers make great apartment dogs and family companions. They need regular grooming and can be barky but are loyal and fun.
